app.title: Four Keys Insights
setup.title: Setup
setup.pat_help: Fine-grained PAT with Pull requests (read) and Contents (read) permissions
setup.repos_empty: No repositories found. Check your PAT permissions.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_data: No data yet. Run a sync first.
dashboard.lead_time_desc: Median time from start point to merge. Start point is configurable in settings.
dashboard.deploy_freq_desc: Total merged PRs (deploys) in the period. Treats PR merge as deployment.
dashboard.cfr_desc: Incident PRs / total PRs * 100. Incident rules are configurable in settings.
dashboard.mttr_desc: Median time from start point to merge for incident PRs.
sync.interrupted: Previous sync was interrupted. Please re-run.
settings.title: Settings
settings.aggregation_unit_desc: How metrics are grouped for the dashboard cards.
settings.aggregation_weekly_desc: Mon-Sun, one week. Cards show the previous confirmed week.
settings.aggregation_monthly_desc: 1st to last day, one month. Cards show the previous confirmed month.
settings.incident_rules_desc: These rules affect both Change Failure Rate and MTTR.
settings.title_keywords_desc: PRs with these keywords in the title are treated as incidents. Default: revert, hotfix
settings.branch_keywords_desc: PRs from branches containing these keywords are treated as incidents. Default: hotfix
settings.incident_labels_desc: PRs with these labels are treated as incidents. Default: incident, bug
settings.lead_time_start_desc: The starting point for measuring change lead time.
settings.mttr_start_desc: The starting point for measuring MTTR. Combining with automated issue creation on incidents makes Issue Created a close approximation of detection time, improving Mean Time to Restore accuracy.
settings.lead_time_first_commit_desc: Branch's first commit time. Falls back to PR created if unavailable.
settings.lead_time_issue_created_desc: Linked issue creation time. Falls back to first commit, then PR created.
settings.delete_group_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group? This action cannot be undone.
